entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Mkataba: sentensi moja inayonikumbusha kuwa utauliza swali moja kwa wakati mmoja na ninaweza kuomba dokezo, ufafanuzi, mfano, changamoto, muhtasari, au ufunuo.
Mikataba ni muhimu zaidi kuliko haiba

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
entries.value: Linganisha mfano mbaya unaovutia na ule sahihi.

entries.source: Copper cash, bolts of cloth, credit relationships

entries.value: Utamaduni wa mahakama uko karibu na kilele chake

entries.source: Court translation and debate were significant
entries.value: Tafsiri ya mahakama na mjadala vilikuwa muhimu

entries.source: court, assembly, palace, command tent, or administrative center
entries.value: mahakama, mkutano, jumba la kifalme, hema la amri, au kituo cha utawala

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
entries.value: Mahakama, chumba cha kusomea, seli ya gereza, hema la uwanja wa vita...

entries.source: Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Unda ubao wa kazi wa pamoja, omba mchango wangu wa kwanza, kisha fanya kazi kando yangu na vituo vya ukaguzi.
Amri za kutotoka nje na malango ya kata ni muhimu
Maisha ya kila siku, uvumbuzi, siasa, chakula...

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Ulinzi wa mjadala, demokrasia ya kijamii, na gharama ya maelewano ya kikatiba.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Kanuni ya majadiliano: mwanafunzi anapoomba kumaliza au kujadili, muhtasari wa uvumbuzi, imani ya ushahidi, kutokuwa na uhakika kwingine, na utoe stempu ya pasipoti.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Kurekebisha hitilafu si kubahatisha. Unaunda nadharia, kagua njia ndogo zaidi inayoshindwa, kisha ubadilishe kigezo kimoja kwa wakati mmoja.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Fafanua mstari wa mwisho wa zege na mmiliki.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Fafanua kitu tunachotengeneza na kiwango kinachopaswa kufikia.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
entries.value: Futa uletaji na uweke jibu kwa bidii.

entries.source: Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Delhi ilikuwa kituo kikuu katika uasi wa 1857

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Mahitaji yanabadilika kwenda kulia kwa sababu kahawa ni ghali zaidi.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Endeleza chaguo bora zaidi kuwa kitu kinachoweza kupimika.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Chunguza sekta moja katika sentensi 5: bainisha nguvu mbili kuu, eleza kwa nini, na uhukumu ikiwa faida inaonekana kulindwa.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Ugumu huongezeka au hupungua kulingana na jibu lako.
ombi la mtu wa moja kwa moja
moja kwa moja, yenye kujenga, inayozingatia ushahidi

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Usiiendeshe hii kama gumzo la kawaida au kama mtu maarufu aliyevaa mavazi ya kuigiza.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Iliyoandikwa, ujenzi unaoaminika, ufafanuzi wa kisasa, inayopingwa, au ya kubuni.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Wakati wa mgogoro, uhamisho, kesi, au kifungo

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Maliza kila mbio kwa kifaa au uamuzi.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Maliza kipindi hiki kwa kifaa cha muhtasari: kile ambacho mtu huyo alibishania, kile nilichokipinga, maarifa yenye nguvu zaidi, madai dhaifu zaidi, muktadha wa kihistoria uliopatikana, maswali yaliyo wazi, mikutano inayopendekezwa ijayo, na nukuu zozote zilizohifadhiwa zilizowekwa alama wazi kama ufafanuzi uliotolewa isipokuwa kama zimeainishwa chanzo.
Kiingereza miongoni mwa vikosi vya Kampuni
Hulinganisha utumiaji wa maudhui na ujifunzaji.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Enzi, mtazamo wa umma wa ulimwengu, sauti, na kile ambacho rekodi zinaweza kuthibitisha.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Tathmini urithi bila kupunguza muktadha kuwa udhuru au shutuma.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.

entries.value: Mazungumzo kamili ndani ya nafasi za wasomi

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter
entries.value: Mfuatano kamili wa mkutano wa mitaani

entries.source: Exact timing of every alley evacuation
entries.value: Muda kamili wa kila uokoaji wa njia
Mwenendo kamili wa umati wa siku ya kesi

entries.source: Exact words spoken by ordinary people
entries.value: Maneno kamili yaliyosemwa na watu wa kawaida

entries.source: Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Sahihi. Ulinganisho rahisi na ubadilishaji huwapa wateja nguvu dhidi ya mifumo.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Eleza mpango wa utatuzi: taja dalili, dhana yako ya kwanza, jaribio dogo zaidi, na nini kila matokeo yangeashiria.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Eleza mabadiliko ya soko kwa kutaja mkondo unaohamia, sababu ya kuhama, na nini kinatokea kwa bei na kiasi.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Eleza wazo hilo kwa maneno yako mwenyewe, toa mfano mmoja, toa mfano mmoja usiohusika, na uliweke kwenye kesi mpya.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Fichua pembejeo inayokosekana, hatari, shinikizo la wakati, au upeo usio wazi.

entries.source: Fatehpur Sikri was an imperial center
entries.value: Fatehpur Sikri ilikuwa kituo cha kifalme

entries.value: Faubourg Saint-Antoine usiku wa kuamkia Bastille

entries.source: Fire spreads with wind and dense buildings
entries.value: Moto huenea kwa upepo na majengo yaliyokaribiana

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
entries.value: Swali la kwanza: swali moja rahisi la utambuzi.

entries.source: Fixing the visible error message without tracing the state that produced it.
entries.value: Kurekebisha ujumbe wa hitilafu unaoonekana bila kufuatilia hali iliyoizalisha.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Weka alama kwenye muktadha muhimu bila kujaa kila jibu.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period
entries.value: Florence ilikuwa jamhuri katika kipindi hiki

entries.source: Follow a historical question through people, objects, and power.
entries.value: Fuatilia swali la kihistoria kupitia watu, vitu, na mamlaka.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Fuatilia siku ya kawaida au ya maamuzi kwa kuzingatia mazingira, shinikizo, na chaguzi.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.
entries.value: Utoaji wa chakula unaweza kuwa na ushindani mkali, wateja wenye nguvu, na urahisi wa kubadili huduma, jambo ambalo hupunguza faida hata wakati mahitaji yakiwa juu.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Bei za chakula, uvumi, siasa za kifalme, na umati wenye silaha vinasukuma Paris kuelekea mabadiliko makubwa.

entries.source: Foreign merchants gather in regulated spaces

entries.source: Frequent evidence notes and uncertainty labels.
entries.value: Vidokezo vya ushahidi wa mara kwa mara na lebo za kutokuwa na uhakika.

entries.source: frontier, trade route, borderland, ship, monastery, or garrison
entries.value: mpaka, njia ya biashara, eneo la mpakani, meli, monasteri, au kambi ya kijeshi

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Mazungumzo yaliyotengenezwa ni simulizi, si nukuu iliyothibitishwa.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Nipe mada au ubandike vidokezo. Nitaunda kadi 12 zilizolenga zenye vidokezo, mitego, na mifano ya hiari.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Toa mfano mmoja sambamba unaonisaidia kufikiri bila kutatua lengo langu. Malizia na swali moja.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
entries.value: Msingi mzuri. Kagua makosa hapa chini.

entries.source: Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Vema. Ulijaribu muda kabla ya kuandika upya muundo wa data.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Panga mawazo yanayofanana na upe muundo jina.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Mwongozo anatafsiri, lakini wenyeji wanagundua kusita.
Vyama vya wafanyakazi viliunda nguvu za kiraia

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Nipe hatua inayofuata. Nipe kazi moja iliyo wazi na usubiri mchango wangu kabla ya kufanya marekebisho.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
entries.value: Maghala ya bandari karibu na usambazaji wa nafaka wa Roma

entries.source: Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Hali ngumu zaidi: baada ya kujibu, ongeza mfano mbadala au kikomo ambapo wazo hilo linaacha kufanya kazi.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Nisaidie kujifunza kuhusu ugavi na mahitaji

entries.source: Help me understand supply and demand
Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Bei ya juu haimaanishi kuwa mahitaji yameongezeka. Kodi huanzia upande wa ugavi kwa kubadilisha gharama za muuzaji.

entries.source: Historically plausible resident attached to ordinary networks
entries.value: Mkazi anayewezekana kihistoria aliyeunganishwa na mitandao ya kawaida

entries.source: Horse sweat, incense, lacquer, copper cash, and languages braided through a regulated market.
entries.value: Jasho la farasi, uvumba, laki, sarafu za shaba, na lugha zilizosukwa kupitia soko lililodhibitiwa.

entries.source: Hot tar, panicked footsteps, bells, smoke, and the crack of timber in a city built too tightly.
entries.value: Lami ya moto, nyayo za watu waliopata hofu, kengele, moshi, na mipasuko ya mbao katika jiji lililojengwa kwa msongamano mkubwa.

entries.source: How any single bystander felt about Socrates
entries.value: Jinsi mpita njia yeyote alivyohisi kumhusu Socrates

entries.source: How deep should the expedition go?
entries.value: Msafara unapaswa kwenda ndani kiasi gani?

entries.source: How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
How strict should the crossing be?
entries.value: Kuvuka kunapaswa kuwa na masharti magumu kiasi gani?

entries.source: How strong are you right now?
entries.value: Una nguvu kiasi gani hivi sasa?
Ushahidi unapaswa kuonekana kwa uwazi kiasi gani?

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Ninaomba maelezo ya moja kwa moja. Toa maelezo mafupi, kisha unihitaji nirejee wazo lililosahihishwa kwa maneno yangu mwenyewe.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Ninaweza kufupisha ufafanuzi, lakini bado nahitaji uthibitisho mmoja wa uelewa kabla ya kufungua hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Sikuweza kujibu kwa sasa. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Sikuweza kutengeneza staha hiyo kwa sasa. Jaribu mada fupi au madokezo rahisi zaidi.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Sikuweza kutengeneza maswali hayo kwa sasa. Jaribu mada rahisi zaidi au ujaribu tena.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Sikuweza kuhifadhi ukaguzi huo wa kadi. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Sikuweza kukadiria jibu hilo. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Nitaiweka somo ikiwa hai: dokezo, rekebisha, punguza kasi, au ongeza changamoto unapouliza.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Ikiwa niko tayari, niulize kueleza wazo hilo kwa maneno yangu mwenyewe. Ikiwa sivyo, uliza swali moja linalohitajika kabla ya usanisi wa mwisho.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Ikiwa bei inapanda huku kiasi kikibaki thabiti, mapato yanaweza kuongezeka. Ikiwa gharama zitapanda kwa kasi zaidi, mtiririko wa pesa taslimu unaweza bado kushuka.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Ikiwa gharama za uzalishaji zitapanda, wauzaji wanahitaji bei ya juu ili kusambaza kiasi kilekile, kwa hivyo mkondo wa usambazaji unahamia kushoto.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Ikiwa unaelewa dhana, unaweza kutoa mfano, kinyume cha mfano, na kutatua kesi ndogo isiyo ya kawaida.
Inapuuza visababishi vya upande wa usambazaji.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Kupuuza utumwa, hali ya uhuru, na ulinzi kungefanya dhana zako kuwa za kisasa dhahiri.
Karatasi ya muswada iliyoonyeshwa kwa picha
